subject: LU-16307 util: fix lnetctl bugs that break sanity-sec

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

Patch Set 2:

Code-wise looks good to me.

Patch Set 2:

It looks like there is still something missing, since sanity-sec test_31 is failing consistently for Gerrit Janitor (though that said it was previously being skipped because of the LNETCTL issue.

The test output looks like:

 dsh@oleg209-client: oleg209-server: ssh exited with exit code 1
 pdsh@oleg209-client: oleg209-server: ssh exited with exit code 1
 oleg209-client: sh: /usr/sbin/ksocklnd-config: No such file or directory
 pdsh@oleg209-client: oleg209-client: ssh exited with exit code 254
 oleg209-server: sh: /usr/sbin/ksocklnd-config: No such file or directory
 pdsh@oleg209-client: oleg209-server: ssh exited with exit code 254
 sanity-sec test_31: @@@@@@ FAIL: unable to configure NID tcp999 

While the console looks like:
 [  158.457906] LNet: Added LNI 192.168.201.9@tcp999 [8/256/0/180]
 [  159.036762] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: sanity-sec test_31: @@@@@@ FAIL: unable to configure NID tcp999
 [  161.743731] LNet: Removed LNI 192.168.201.9@tcp999

It looks like the NIs are being added/removed properly, but possibly something wrong with /usr/sbin/ksocklnd-config?

commit.subject: LU-16307 util: fix lnetctl bugs that break sanity-sec
commit.message:
LU-16307 util: fix lnetctl bugs that break sanity-sec

For lnetctl net commands you always need a --net option. For the
case of creating a local NI you need a list of interfaces.
For yaml_lnet_config_ni() I was always requiring a list of
interfaces which is wrong. Only test for missing interfaces
for the NLM_F_CREATE case.

Second bug is if we fail to detect Netlink we use the old api.
We end up freeing some needed parameters instead of passing
them to old APIs. Jump to old api code without freeing parameter
data.

Fixes: 8f8f6e2f3 ("LU-10003 lnet: use Netlink to support old and new NI APIs.")
Change-Id: I4b11372b9afa8023bcbaba3297dd04196d22ef05
